title: corylus × spinescens
intro: Corylus × spinescens, also known as the spine hazel or hybrid hazel, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Betulaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Corylus × spinescens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Corylus × spinescens can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which are often used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and gastrointestinal issues.
